title: Chattar
empty_subtitle: Tap the compose button to start a conversation
remove_friend_body: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from your friends?
remove_friend_body_alt: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} as a friend?
muted_body: You will no longer receive notifications from {{name}}.
unmuted_body: You will now receive notifications from {{name}}.
message_blocked: Messaging is not available with this user. One of you may have blocked the other.
message_blocked_alt: You cannot send messages to this user. They may have blocked you or you may have blocked them.
message_failed: Failed to send message. Please check your connection och try again.
upload_error_body: Failed to upload file. Please try again.
report_submitted_body: Thank you for your report. Our moderation team will review it shortly.
